What entities are present on the countertop and how are they arranged?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a pink shirt and blue apron stands behind a speckled countertop. A white floral teapot sits centrally, flanked by a blue tea tin labeled 'Whittard English Rose' on the right. Two silver spoons lie parallel in front of the teapot, while a white digital timer and electric kettle are visible in the background.

question: Describe the visible text on the tea tin and the person's posture near the teapot.
canonical_answer: The blue rectangular tin displays the text 'Whittard ENGLISH ROSE' on the front. The person rests their hands on the countertop near the base of the white ceramic teapot. The teapot features a floral pattern with pink and blue flowers and a lid with a knob. A white digital timer sits to the left of the spoons.
